title: Currency rates
description: A cached foreign-exchange rate the treasurer looked up (via webSearch) so expenses in mixed currencies can be normalized to the trip's home currency without re-searching every roll-up. A lightweight cache, refreshed by the currency cron hook.

base.description: the currency being converted FROM (ISO code, e.g. 'EUR')

quote.description: the currency being converted TO (ISO code, e.g. 'USD')

rate.description: how many units of `quote` one unit of `base` buys

source.description: where the rate came from (a cited webSearch source or 'estimate')

fetchedAt.description: when this rate was recorded; the roll-up prefers the freshest
